reasoning_content: We need to determine if 193 is prime. Check divisibility: sqrt(193) ≈ 13.9, so check primes up to 13: 2,3,5,7,11,13. 193 is odd, not divisible by 3 (1+9+3=13, not divisible by 3), not by 5 (last digit not 0 or 5), by 7: 7*27=189, remainder 4, so no. 11: 11*17=187, remainder 6; 13: 13*14=182, remainder 11. So it's prime. Answer: yes.
